name: nginx-multisite
description: Installs and configures Nginx with multiple SSL-enabled virtual hosts, security hardening (UFW firewall, fail2ban, SSH hardening, sysctl tuning), and self-signed TLS certificate generation for three internal cluster subdomains. Includes a custom lineinfile LWRP and static site content files.

name: cache
description: Configures a dual caching layer by delegating Memcached installation to the upstream memcached Supermarket cookbook and Redis installation to the redisio Supermarket cookbook, with password authentication, a custom log directory, and a post-install ruby_block workaround to strip deprecated Redis config directives.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Performs end-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application cloned from GitHub, including Python virtual environment setup, pip dependency installation, PostgreSQL database and user provisioning, a .env configuration file, and a systemd unit for process supervision.
